indicators.label: Unemployment
indicators.what_it_means: Tight labor market means higher driver wages and recruiting costs for fleets.

indicators.label: Avg Hourly Earnings
indicators.what_it_means: Rising wages pressure fleet operating margins. Driver pay is the largest cost after fuel.

indicators.label: Diesel PPI
indicators.what_it_means: Wholesale diesel prices trending. Downstream pump prices typically follow within 2-4 weeks.

indicators.label: Consumer Prices (CPI)
indicators.what_it_means: General inflation trends affect equipment costs, insurance, and operating expenses.
